hooks.command: f=$(python -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.dart) out=$(cd /d/nebencheck/nebencheck && /d/flutter/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin/dart.exe analyze --fatal-infos 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; exit 0
